fontFamilies.display: General Sans, Source Han Sans SC, sans-serif
fontFamilies.body: Instrument Sans, Source Han Sans SC, sans-serif
fontFamilies.mono: IBM Plex Mono, Cascadia Code, monospace

visualIntent.summary: Create a warm editorial evidence workspace that feels precise, inspectable, and actively composed rather than magically generated.

invariants: Warm paper is the default canvas; white is reserved for focused work surfaces.
Cobalt communicates action and selection; signal lime is limited to evidence marks.
Structure comes from typography and rules, not glass effects or stacked shadows.
Every inference exposes its confidence and source class.

layout.summary: Use an asymmetric twelve-column editorial grid with a strict workbench grid after analysis begins.

details.workspace: summary header, tab rail, focused panel

color.summary: Keep a warm neutral foundation with black ink, one cobalt action color, and a sparse lime evidence signal.

typography.summary: Use a compact grotesk display face, a highly legible UI sans, and a mono face for provenance and machine evidence.

details.fallback: Use open-source substitutes with similar width and x-height; record substitutions.

spacing.summary: Use a four-pixel base with deliberate 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, and 72 pixel steps.

surfaces.summary: Separate surfaces with fine rules, paper tone, and only one elevated panel shadow; use 4, 8, and 14 pixel radii.

components.summary: Compose controls from an index, functional label, evidence class, primary content, and an explicit action or state.

imagery.summary: Use real interface captures or locally drawn neutral canvases; avoid generic AI characters, glowing orbs, and empty gray placeholders.

iconography.summary: Use sparse geometric arrows and status marks at a consistent optical weight; never substitute emoji.

responsiveness.summary: Collapse the hero and workspace to one column below 760 pixels; keep tabs horizontally scrollable and move dense comparison into a full-width panel.

details.boundary: The exact source breakpoints are not claimed; 760px is an authored implementation rule.

interactions.summary: Make every source mode, rights choice, result tab, copy action, and export control keyboard reachable with a visible focus ring.

motion.summary: Use 120–240ms causal transitions for capture, classification, validation, and export; remove movement when reduced motion is requested.

accessibility.summary: Preserve semantic landmarks, labelled tabs, 4.5:1 body contrast, visible focus, non-color status cues, touch targets, reflow, and reduced motion.

content.summary: Use concrete Chinese product copy that explains evidence, confidence, limitations, and actions; avoid vague AI superlatives.

constraints.summary: Do not copy source branding, text, images, or protected assets. Do not use purple gradients, glassmorphism, generic SaaS card rows, robots, or unverified pixel-perfect claims.

acceptance: Verify keyboard focus, reduced motion, evidence labels, and export contents.
Keep the StyleSpec schema and Skill copy identical.
